reasoning.research_depth: Solid understanding of algorithms and graphics programming. Demonstrates through implementation rather than academic citation.
reasoning.signal_noise: Exceptional signal-to-noise ratio. Pure content delivery with beautiful visualizations and zero filler.

reasoning.lasting_impact: Good evergreen potential for algorithmic and graphics concepts. The visual explanations transcend specific implementations.
